debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
X1 X2 : Set ↑A
h : HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A X1 = HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A X2
⊢ X1 ⊆ X2

proof:
by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  cases this with | intro y hy =>
    rw [←Subtype.eq hy.2]
    exact hy.1
failed_attempts:
fun x hx =>
  match h ▸ (⟨x, hx, rfl⟩ : x.val ∈ val_image A X1) with
  | ⟨y, hy, heq⟩ => Subtype.eq heq ▸ hy

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rcases this with ⟨x', hx', heq⟩
  rwa [← Subtype.eq heq] at hx'

by
  intro x hx
  have h' : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by rw [←h]; exists x; exact ⟨hx, rfl⟩
  cases h' with | intro x' h' =>
    cases h' with | intro hx' heq =>
      rw [Subtype.eq heq.symm]
      exact hx'
successful_attempts:
by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  cases this with | intro y hy =>
    rw [←Subtype.eq hy.2]
    exact hy.1

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rcases this with ⟨y, hy, heq⟩
  rw [Subtype.eq heq.symm]
  exact hy

by
  intro x hx
  have h' : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  cases h' with | intro y hy =>
    rw [←Subtype.eq hy.2]
    exact hy.1

by
  intro x hx
  obtain ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rwa [Subtype.eq heq.symm]

by
  intro x hx
  have h' : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by rw [←h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rcases h' with ⟨x', hx', heq⟩
  rwa [Subtype.eq heq.symm]

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by rw [←h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rcases this with ⟨x', hx', heq⟩
  rwa [←Subtype.eq heq]

by
  intro a ha
  have : a.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by rw [←h]; exact ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩
  obtain ⟨x, hx, heq⟩ := this
  have : x = a := Subtype.eq heq
  rw [←this]
  exact hx

by
  intro x hx
  have h' : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  match h' with
  | ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ =>
    rw [←Subtype.eq heq]
    exact hx'

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rcases this with ⟨x', hx', heq⟩
  have : x = x' := Subtype.eq heq.symm
  rw [this]
  exact hx'

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  cases this with | intro x' h' =>
    cases h' with | intro hx' heq =>
      rw [Subtype.eq heq.symm]
      exact hx'

by
  intro x hx
  have h1 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h1
  obtain ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ := h1
  rwa [Subtype.eq heq] at hx'

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at this
  rcases this with ⟨x', hx', heq⟩
  rwa [Subtype.eq heq] at hx'

by
  intro a ha
  have : a.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩
  cases this with | intro x hx =>
    rw [←Subtype.eq hx.2]
    exact hx.1

by
  intro a ha
  have h1 : a.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩
  cases h1 with | intro x hx =>
  cases hx with | intro hx heq =>
  rw [←Subtype.eq heq]
  exact hx

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  obtain ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ := this
  rwa [←Subtype.eq heq]

by
  intro x hx
  have h' : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h'
  obtain ⟨y, hy, heq⟩ := h'
  rw [Subtype.eq heq.symm]
  exact hy

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  obtain ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ := this
  rw [← Subtype.eq heq]
  exact hx'

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  match this with
  | ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ =>
    rw [← Subtype.eq heq]
    exact hx'

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  obtain ⟨y, hy, heq⟩ := this
  rwa [Subtype.eq heq] at hy

by
  intro x hx
  obtain ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rwa [Subtype.eq heq.symm]

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by rw [←h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  obtain ⟨y, hy, heq⟩ := this
  rwa [Subtype.eq heq] at hy

by
  intro x hx
  have h₁ : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rw [h] at h₁
  obtain ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ := h₁
  rw [Subtype.eq heq.symm]
  exact hx'

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by rw [←h]; exact ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  rcases this with ⟨y, hy, heq⟩
  rw [←Subtype.eq heq]
  exact hy

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  obtain ⟨y, hy, heq⟩ := this
  rw [←Subtype.eq heq]
  exact hy

by
  intro a ha
  have h' : a.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩
  obtain ⟨x, hx, heq⟩ := h'
  rw [Subtype.eq heq] at hx
  exact hx

by
  intro a ha
  have h' : a.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨a, ha, rfl⟩
  cases h' with | intro x hx =>
    rw [←Subtype.eq hx.2]
    exact hx.1

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  obtain ⟨x', hx', heq⟩ := this
  rw [←Subtype.eq heq]
  exact hx'

by
  intro x hx
  have : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := h ▸ ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
  cases this with | intro x' h' =>
    cases h' with | intro hx' heq =>
      rwa [←Subtype.eq heq]
